summary: Tested payment_status dynamic computation and payment history fix for Paddy Purchase. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: PAID badge visible, Undo+History button visible, Payment History shows advance entries correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: payment_status is now computed dynamically in GET /api/private-paddy (lines 269-276) - correctly sets 'paid' when paid_amount >= total_amount
History endpoint GET /api/private-paddy/{id}/history (lines 702-744) now includes advance entries from cash_transactions with reference pvt_paddy_adv:*
Frontend PaddyPurchase.jsx correctly shows Undo button for payment_status === 'paid' (line 322) and Undo+History button for paid_amount > 0 (line 327)
seed_data_creation: Test entries created with TEST_ prefix for payment status tests - auto-cleaned after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: payment_status is now computed dynamically in GET endpoints. When paid_amount >= total_amount, status is 'paid'. History endpoint includes advance entries from cash_transactions (pvt_paddy_adv:*). Frontend shows PAID badge, Undo button for paid entries, and Undo+History button for entries with paid_amount > 0.

payment_status_dynamic_computation.details: Creating entry with paid_amount >= total_amount shows payment_status='paid' in GET response

history_shows_advance_entries.details: GET /api/private-paddy/{id}/history returns advance entries from cash_transactions (not empty)

undo_paid_resets_status.details: POST /api/private-paddy/{id}/undo-paid resets paid_amount to 0 and payment_status to 'pending'

partial_payment_status_pending.details: Entry with paid_amount < total_amount has payment_status='pending'

ui_paid_badge_visible.details: PAID badge visible in Balance column when payment_status='paid'

ui_undo_history_button_visible.details: Orange Undo+History button visible for entries with paid_amount > 0

ui_history_dialog_shows_advance.details: Payment History dialog shows advance entry with amount and 'advance' label

code_review_notes.private_trading_py_get_endpoint: Lines 269-276: payment_status computed dynamically based on paid_amount >= total_amount
code_review_notes.private_trading_py_history_endpoint: Lines 709-724: Includes advance entries from cash_transactions with reference pvt_paddy_adv:*
code_review_notes.PaddyPurchase_jsx_undo_button: Line 322-325: Undo button shows when payment_status === 'paid' and user.role === 'admin'
code_review_notes.PaddyPurchase_jsx_undo_history_button: Lines 327-330: Orange Undo+History button shows when paid_amount > 0 and user.role === 'admin'
